info.title: Noxivo Engine API
info.description:
Independent, headless WhatsApp & Automation engine.

Quick Links:
• Go to Admin Dashboard | Documentation

apiKey.name: API-Key
apiKey.description: Your secret API key. Get it from Client Dashboard > Settings > API Keys.

psk.name: Authorization
psk.description: Internal PSK for admin and registration routes.

post.description: Send a high-performance, white-labeled message (text or media) through the Noxivo engine. Supports multiple providers with automatic failover.

to.description: Recipient phone number (e.g. "1234567890") or full WhatsApp ID (e.g. "1234567890@c.us")

text.description: The text content of the message. Required if no attachments are provided.

agencyId.description: Internal Agency Identifier. Required if using a non-scoped platform API key.

tenantId.description: Internal Tenant Identifier. Required if using a non-scoped platform API key.

attachments.description: Optional list of media attachments. Currently only one attachment per message is supported.

url.description: Publicly accessible URL of the media file.

mimeType.description: Standard MIME type of the file.

caption.description: Caption text to accompany the media.

id.description: The unique message ID generated by the engine.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the message was processed.

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API Key

schema.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing API Key

500.description: Internal server error or provider failure

schema.description: Internal server error or provider failure

get.description: Retrieve a list of active conversation threads

post.description: Initialize a new WhatsApp messaging session for a specific agency and tenant. If a session already exists, it returns the current status.

agencyId.description: The unique identifier for the agency.

tenantId.description: The unique identifier for the tenant (sub-account).

accountName.description: A friendly name for this messaging account.

sessionName.description: The internal name of the session used for subsequent API calls.

status.description: Current connection status of the session.

502.description: Bad Gateway - Failed to communicate with the messaging provider

schema.description: Bad Gateway - Failed to communicate with the messaging provider

get.description: List all engine sessions with live status from MessagingProvider
Get session by agency and tenant ID

post.description: Start session in MessagingProvider
Stop session in MessagingProvider
Restart session in MessagingProvider
Logout session in MessagingProvider

get.description: Real-time event stream for the engine Mission Control
Owner-only profile for admin dashboard session bootstrap

post.description: Owner-only admin logout that clears dashboard session cookie

get.description: Owner-only metadata view of Messaging Provider OpenAPI grouped by tags for API explorer

post.description: Owner-only MessagingProvider explorer request executor with path+method allowlist validation

body.description: Optional JSON request body forwarded upstream

get.description: Owner-only Mission Control hierarchical sessions payload (Agency -> Client -> Sessions)

post.description: Owner-only start MessagingProvider session binding by id
Owner-only stop MessagingProvider session binding by id
Owner-only logout MessagingProvider session binding by id

get.description: Owner-only session status by binding id
Owner-only QR payload by binding id

post.description: Owner-only bootstrap a WhatsApp session for an agency/tenant pair

get.description: Owner-only worker and queue status
Owner-only Mission Control event stream

post.description: Owner-only login for standalone Admin SPA
Developer registration for engine docs

get.description: Owner-only list of pending developers

post.description: Register a new dashboard with the workflow engine (protected by PSK)

apiKey.description: API key the dashboard will use

get.description: Get dashboard config by agencyId (protected by PSK)
List all agencies from all dashboards (protected by PSK)
Engine admin: List all registered dashboards
Engine admin: Get specific dashboard details
Engine admin: Get all sessions for a specific dashboard (agency)

post.description: Engine admin: Mark dashboard as synced
Engine admin: Suspend a dashboard
Engine admin: Reactivate a suspended dashboard

get.description: Get real-time BullMQ worker and queue status
Fetch QR code for pairing a specific session
Check connection status of a specific session
Fetch detailed profile information for a session
Fetch contacts for a session

post.description: Send media attachment through engine

get.description: Check status of upstream messaging provider server
Fetch status updates (stories) for a session

post.description: Post text status (story) for a session

get.description: Get internal storage metrics
List MessagingProvider API keys (Master only)
Get or create the scoped API key for the current session context

post.description: Generate a new scoped API key for the current session context

delete.description: Revoke the current scoped API key

get.description: Fallback passthrough for MessagingProvider endpoints not implemented as native engine routes

post.description: Get AI Sales Agent state (enabled/mode) for a specific tenant

put.description: Update AI Sales Agent state (enabled/mode) for a specific tenant

post.description: Get AI Sales Agent persona configuration for a specific tenant

put.description: Update AI Sales Agent persona configuration for a specific tenant
